features: High quality materials: Our hair editing tools are made of high-quality plastic materials, which are sturdy and durable, and can be used for a long time
Hair Knitting Set: The set includes 1 metal mouse tail comb and a pair of knitting tools that can pass through the hair
Various hairstyles: You can easily create ball head, braid, ponytail, fluffy hair, and wave head hairstyles, making you more elegant at parties
Suitable for all hair: Hair weaving tools are suitable for girls and women with thick, straight or curly hair
Service: We hope that our products can provide you with a good sense of use. If you have any concerns, please let us know and we will be happy to assist you
description: Product Description Different hairstyles can instantly change one's temperament, and a good braiding tool enables you to switch styles at any time! Easy and convenient to carry and use, perfect of all hair types. Easy to create a simple and elegant hairstyle, easy to operate, suitable for parties, banquets and daily life.
